channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Saints announce rookie Spencer Rattler will start for injured Derek Carr vs. Buccaneers
item.description: With Derek Carr sidelined for multiple weeks with an oblique injury, the New Orleans Saints are turning to rookie quarterback Spencer Rattler this week against the Tampa Bay Buccaneers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL investigating George Pickens' explicit message on eye black during Steelers game: report
item.description: The NFL is reportedly investigating Pittsburgh Steelers wide receiver George Pickens for having an explicit message on his eye black against the Dallas Cowboys.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dodgers turn to Brasier to start NLDS Game 4 vs Padres as they try to stave off elimination
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers are going with reliever Ryan Brasier as their starter for Game 4 against the San Diego Padres on Wednesday night as they try to avoid elimination in their NL Division Series. Manager Dave Roberts said Tuesday that the Dodgers would go with a bullpen game.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 2 teams suing NASCAR ask court to recognize them as chartered while antitrust case proceeds
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — The two teams suing NASCAR asked a judge for a preliminary injunction Wednesday so they can compete next season under the charter system they are challenging as their antitrust case moves through federal court.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Raiders return to Aidan O'Connell as starting QB against the Steelers, benching Gardner Minshew
item.description: HENDERSON, Nev. (AP) — When Antonio Pierce became the Raiders' interim coach midway through last season, his first major act was naming then-rookie Aidan O'Connell the starting quarterback.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sky officials are light on details in discussing their decision to fire Weatherspoon after 1 year
item.description: BEDFORD PARK, Ill. (AP) — Chicago Sky officials were light on specifics Wednesday when discussing their decision to fire former coach Teresa Weatherspoon after one season, saying there was no particular catalyst and that it was simply time to move on from the Naismith Hall of Famer.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lakers show off California Destiny City Edition uniforms, new-look court
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers are showing off some brand-new uniforms and a few changes to Crypto.com Arena court ahead of the 2024-25 NBA season. The California Destiny City Edition uniform incorporates a black and purple gradient and replaces the iconic Lakers lettering with Lake Show on the front.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: College hockey equipment manager forced to play goalie in huge NCAA Division I game
item.description: Merrimack College's ice hockey team started student manager Spencer Marquis on Sunday. It was supposed to be his first game as part of the equipment staff.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Troy Aikman says he heard Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are engaged: 'I might have broke the story'
item.description: Troy Aikman slipped up Monday night when he referred to Taylor Swift as Travis Kelce's "missus," but he says he heard a rumor the two are engaged.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tigers tap Keider Montero to open ALDS Game 3, with manager A.J. Hinch seeking more bullpen magic
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — The Detroit Tigers plan to put right-hander Keider Montero on the mound against the Cleveland Guardians in Game 3 of their AL Division Series on Wednesday, when one team will earn an edge in the best-of-five series.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rodgers says allegations that he played a role in Saleh's firing as Jets coach are 'patently false'
item.description: Aaron Rodgers insisted he played no role in the firing of Robert Saleh as the New York Jets coach and called such allegations “patently false.”.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Waszak Jr., Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bucs' 3-word message as Hurricane Milton set to devastate Florida
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers offered a three-word message to Florida residents as Hurricane Milton is set to devastate the state's western coast line.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lynx eliminate Sun behind Napheesa Collier's 27 points; will play Liberty in WNBA Finals
item.description: The Minnesota Lynx topped the Connecticut Sun on Tuesday night to win the series and move onto the WNBA Finals for the first time since 2017.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Santa Cruz Warriors reveals head coach Nicholas Kerr’s 2024-25 staff
item.description: The Santa Cruz Warriors revealed second-year Head Coach Nicholas Kerr's staff for the 2024-25 NBA G League season on Tuesday. Hilton Armstrong and Ben Stelzer have both been named assistant coaches.
item.dc:creator: Sentinel Staff Report, The Mercury News

item.title: Jeff Ulbrich was a gritty player, a respected assistant and now takes over a struggling Jets team
item.description: Jeff Ulbrich was in the middle of putting together the game plan for the New York Jets' defense when he got the news that stunned him — and the rest of the NFL. Robert Saleh was out as the head coach. And Ulbrich was taking over for the rest of the season.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tatis homers again as the Padres beat the Dodgers 6-5 for a 2-1 NLDS lead
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Fernando Tatis Jr.'s towering two-run home run highlighted a six-run second inning, and the San Diego Padres held on to beat Shohei Ohtani and the rival Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 on Tuesday night to take a 2-1 lead in a tense NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lynx return to finals with 88-77 win over Sun in Game 5 behind Collier's 27 points, 11 rebounds
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The Minnesota Lynx are three wins from a fifth championship, chasing a league record with an entirely different core from the previous dynasty. Napheesa Collier is fully in charge of this group.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets owner says firing of Saleh will bring 'new energy' to one of franchise's 'most talented teams'
item.description: Woody Johnson sensed his struggling New York Jets needed a change — and now. So the owner made the stunning decision Tuesday to fire coach Robert Saleh just five games into his fourth season after the team's 2-3 start following a 23-17 loss to Minnesota in London on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah Hockey Club celebrates opening game with evening-long Delta Center plaza party
item.description: Just 172 days after it was announced Utah would be joining the National Hockey League, the Utah Hockey Club is set to play its first game in its inaugural season.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Rockies bringing back the franchise's all-time winningest manager Bud Black for the 2025 season
item.description: DENVER (AP) — The Colorado Rockies announced Tuesday they are bringing back Bud Black, the franchise's all-time winningest manager, for another season on the heels of a sixth straight losing campaign. The Rockies extended Black through 2025.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How to watch Padres, Dodgers in NLDS
item.description: The Padres' postseason journey continues as the team gets ready to play their bitter rivals, the Los Angeles Dodgers, in the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5
